ValidationRule.description: Record cannot be set to PoC Details Provided if claim amount is missing.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c), ISCHANGED(Claim_Amount__c )), ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c,'PoC Details Provided'),( Claim_Amount__c <= 0) || ISNULL(Claim_Amount__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Record cannot be set to PoC Details Provided if claim amount is missing.
